name: The Forgotten Castle
description: An ancient castle shrouded in mist, perched atop a cliff that the locals dare not climb. They say a dragon once kept its hoard here — but the dragon is long gone. What remains are locked doors, cunning traps, and treasures waiting for the bold.

entrance.name: Castle Entrance
entrance.description: You stand before a massive stone archway, its iron portcullis rusted half-open. Moss creeps up the weathered walls, and a cold draft flows from within. The path behind you disappears into thick fog — there is no going back. To the north, a dim corridor stretches into darkness. To the east, you hear the faint sound of dripping water.

great-hall.name: The Great Hall
great-hall.description: A cavernous hall with vaulted ceilings lost in shadow. Tattered banners hang from the walls — their heraldry too faded to read. A long oak table dominates the center, its surface scarred by swordplay. Dust motes drift through shafts of pale light from narrow windows high above. Passages lead south back to the entrance, east to a library, and west to a kitchen.

hazards.description: Cobwebs thick as curtains drape the corners — something large spun them.
hazards.deathText: As you brush past the cobwebs, an enormous spider drops from the ceiling and sinks its fangs into your neck. The venom works fast.

fountain-room.name: The Fountain Room
fountain-room.description: A circular chamber with a cracked marble fountain at its center. Water still trickles weakly from the mouth of a stone lion, pooling in the basin below. The walls are decorated with faded murals depicting a castle in its former glory. An archway leads west back to the entrance.

hazards.description: The floor tiles are slick with moisture — watch your step.
hazards.deathText: Your foot slips on the wet tiles and you crash through the crumbled fountain rim. Your head strikes the stone floor with a sickening crack.

library.name: The Ancient Library
library.description: Towering bookshelves line every wall, though most volumes have crumbled to dust. A reading desk sits beneath a high window, bathed in pale light. The smell of old parchment fills the air. A passage leads west back to the great hall, and a narrow stairway climbs upward to the north.

kitchen.name: The Castle Kitchen
kitchen.description: A wide stone hearth dominates one wall, its fire long cold. Copper pots hang from iron hooks overhead, green with verdigris. A heavy wooden door to the north is bound shut with a rusted iron lock. The great hall lies to the east.

hazards.description: Rats scurry in the shadows beneath the shelves.

tower-stairs.name: The Tower Stairway
tower-stairs.description: A narrow spiral staircase winds upward, its stone steps worn smooth by centuries of footsteps. Arrow slits in the outer wall let in thin blades of cold air. The library is back to the south. The stairs continue upward to the north, but a heavy iron gate blocks the way.

hazards.description: A cold wind howls through the arrow slits, chilling you to the bone.
hazards.deathText: A fierce gust catches you mid-step on the narrow spiral staircase. You stumble, lose your footing, and tumble down the stone steps into darkness.

dungeon.name: The Dungeon
dungeon.description: A grim chamber of dark stone and iron shackles. Water seeps through the walls, and the air is heavy and stale. The only way out is south through the kitchen.

hazards.description: The ceiling is dangerously low — watch your head on the rough-hewn beams.
hazards.deathText: You stand up too quickly and crack your skull on a jagged beam. Stars explode behind your eyes, then nothing.

armory.name: The Armory
armory.description: Racks of rusted weapons line the walls — swords, halberds, and crossbows, all long past their prime. A suit of armor stands in the corner like a silent sentinel. Against one wall sits an ornate chest with a golden lock. A passage leads south back to the tower stairway.

throne-room.name: The Throne Room
throne-room.description: At last — the throne room. A vast chamber with pillars of carved stone and a floor of polished black marble. At the far end, atop a dais, sits an ancient throne of dark wood and silver. Behind it, a tapestry depicts a dragon coiled around a mountain of gold. You have reached the heart of the Forgotten Castle.

secret-garden.name: The Secret Garden
secret-garden.description: Through a hidden door you discover an enclosed courtyard open to the sky. Wildflowers and ivy have reclaimed the space, growing over crumbled statues and stone benches. A crystal-clear spring bubbles up from the ground. It's peaceful here — a sharp contrast to the castle's gloom. The fountain room is back to the east.

torch.name: Torch
torch.description: A sturdy wooden torch wrapped in oil-soaked rags. It gives off a warm, flickering light.
torch.roomText: A torch flickers in an iron sconce on the wall.
torch.pickupText: You lift the torch from its iron sconce. Its flame casts dancing shadows on the walls.

silver-coin.name: Silver Coin
silver-coin.description: A tarnished silver coin stamped with the face of a long-dead king. It feels oddly warm to the touch.
silver-coin.roomText: A silver coin glints at the bottom of the fountain basin.
silver-coin.pickupText: You fish the silver coin out of the fountain basin. It glints in the light.

old-book.name: Old Book
old-book.description: A leather-bound tome titled 'The Secrets of Castle Drakenmoor.' A bookmark is placed at a page describing a hidden garden accessible through the fountain room's west wall.
old-book.roomText: A single intact book rests on the reading desk, its leather cover embossed with a golden lock.
old-book.pickupText: You carefully pick up the ancient book. A loose page flutters to the ground — it's a map fragment.

rusty-key.name: Rusty Key
rusty-key.description: A heavy iron key, orange with rust but still solid. It looks like it would fit a large, old lock.
rusty-key.roomText: A rusty key hangs on a hook beside the hearth.
rusty-key.pickupText: You grab the rusty key from the kitchen shelf. It's heavier than it looks.

stale-bread.name: Stale Bread
stale-bread.description: A rock-hard loaf of bread. It's been here a very long time, but surprisingly hasn't molded — just petrified.
stale-bread.roomText: A petrified loaf of bread sits on the counter.
stale-bread.pickupText: You pick up the stale bread. It's basically a weapon at this point.

golden-key.name: Golden Key
golden-key.description: An ornate golden key with a dragon's head for a bow. It gleams even in the dim dungeon light.
golden-key.roomText: A skeleton slumps against the far wall, its bony fingers still clutching a golden key.
golden-key.pickupText: You pry the golden key from the skeleton's bony grasp. It releases with a soft click.

shield.name: Knight's Shield
shield.description: A battered but sturdy shield bearing the crest of Castle Drakenmoor — a dragon rampant on a field of blue.
shield.roomText: A battered shield leans against the weapon rack.
shield.pickupText: You take the shield from the armor rack. It's dented but still strong.

dragon-crown.name: Dragon Crown
dragon-crown.description: A magnificent crown of silver and gold, set with rubies that seem to glow with inner fire. This is the legendary treasure of Castle Drakenmoor.
dragon-crown.roomText: On the seat of the throne rests a glittering crown that seems to pulse with ancient power.
dragon-crown.pickupText: You lift the Dragon Crown from the throne. It pulses with ancient power. You have claimed the treasure of the Forgotten Castle!

healing-herb.name: Healing Herb
healing-herb.description: A sprig of luminous green herb that grows near the spring. Legend says it can cure any ailment.
healing-herb.roomText: A luminous green herb grows beside the crystal-clear spring.
healing-herb.pickupText: You carefully pluck the healing herb. Its leaves shimmer with a faint, otherworldly light.

unlock-dungeon.description: A heavy wooden door to the north is bound shut with a rusted iron lock.
unlock-dungeon.solvedText: You fit the rusty key into the lock and twist. With a grinding screech, the lock gives way and the door swings open, revealing a dark passage leading north to the dungeon.

unlock-armory.description: A heavy iron gate blocks the way up the tower stairs.
unlock-armory.solvedText: You press the silver coin into the slot on the iron gate. Ancient gears click and whir, and the gate slowly rises, revealing the passage north to the armory.

unlock-throne.description: An ornate chest with a golden lock sits against the wall. Perhaps it holds the key to the passage north.
unlock-throne.solvedText: You insert the golden key into the golden lock on the chest. It turns smoothly. Inside you find a lever — you pull it, and a hidden passage opens to the north, leading to the throne room!

reveal-garden.description: The murals on the wall hint at a hidden space beyond. The old book mentions a secret garden accessible through the west wall.
reveal-garden.solvedText: You hold the old book up to the mural on the west wall. The map fragment inside matches perfectly — you press the hidden stone, and a section of wall grinds open, revealing a secret garden to the west!
